appliedUpdates.description: Added 'Flow Validator Guidance: cross-area-integration' section with isolation rules, dashboard navigation, key constraints from prior milestones, and testing strategy for cross-area assertions

notes: All 8 cross-area integration assertions passed. Known issues from prior milestones (browser back button not closing detail overlay, Plotly drag overlay blocking chart clicks, dash-ag-grid function-based config issues) did not prevent cross-area flows from working correctly. Phase click filtering was verified via Dash set_props workaround. In-app back buttons work correctly as alternative to browser back.
